message:
🌱 Add telepresence: sshfs workaround for WSL/Docker mission (#856)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "telepresence-115-sshfs-won-t-work-inside-wsl-on-windows-or-inside-docker-by-defa",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "telepresence: sshfs won't work inside WSL on Windows, or inside Docker by default",
+    "description": "sshfs won't work inside WSL on Windows, or inside Docker by default. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current telepresence setup",
+        "description": "Verify your telepresence version and Kubernetes connectivity:\n```bash\ntelepresence version\ntelepresence status\nkubectl get pods -n ambassador\n```\nThis feature requires a working telepresence installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the issue",
+        "description": "Telepresence uses `sshfs` for volume mounts during intercepts, but `sshfs` does not work inside Windows Subsystem for Linux (WSL) or inside Docker containers by default. This prevents remote volume mounts from functioning in these environments."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the docker-mount workaround",
+        "description": "The fix adds support for using the [vieux/sshfs](https://github.com/vieux/docker-volume-sshfs) Docker volume driver instead of `sshfs` directly. A new `--docker-mount` CLI option is added, mutually exclusive with `--mount`.\n\nThis works when telepresence is run inside a container. Note that it does not currently work when run from WSL.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions and implementation details."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test the new `--docker-mount` option:\n```bash\ntelepresence intercept <deployment> --docker-mount --port <port>:<port>\n```\nConfirm that volume mounts work correctly when running telepresence inside a Docker container."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added support for using the vieux/sshfs Docker volume driver via a new --docker-mount CLI option as an alternative to native sshfs, enabling volume mounts when running telepresence inside Docker containers.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "telepresence",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "telepresence"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Configmap"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/telepresenceio/telepresence/issues/115",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/telepresenceio/telepresence",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/telepresenceio/telepresence/pull/1079"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "telepresence"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with telepresence installed. Install via: brew install datawire/blackbird/telepresence (macOS) or binary download."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:46:25.990Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
